metadata.description: AI Agent Governance Framework for Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf, Gemini CLI and more. Run /cortex-setup after installation to complete project initialization.

plugins.name: cortex-agent
plugins.description: Governance framework for AI coding assistants. Provides slash-command workflows (/arch-design, /ship, /parallel…), specialized sub-agents (planner, implementer, code-reviewer…), and 9 reusable skills. Run /cortex-setup after install for full project setup.
